Home.title: Warp Key Automatic Collection Tool
Home.description: Automatically collects, validates, and updates Cloudflare Warp+ keys from multiple sources every hour.
Home.latestChangesDesc: Real-time tracking of key availability changes.
Home.noNewKeys: No new keys found in this cycle.

About.title: About This Project
About.description: A robust tool for automatically collecting and maintaining a high-quality pool of Cloudflare Warp+ keys.
About.directAccessDesc: Get the latest key lists directly via our API endpoints. Data is refreshed hourly.

features.fetchDesc: Scrapes keys from Telegram and other sources.
features.trackDesc: Tracks key stability and availability over time.
features.apiDesc: Simple text-based endpoints for easy integration.

About.deploymentDesc: You can deploy this tool yourself. The original Go implementation supports local running, while this web version is optimized for Vercel Serverless.
About.fullListApiDesc: Get all ~100 valid keys, newline separated.
About.liteListApiDesc: Get 15 random valid keys, newline separated.
About.legacySupportDesc: Based on the original Go implementation. This modern web version offers a visual interface and API.
About.author: Created by Haoyu Wang

API.title: API Access
API.description: Integrate Warp Key directly into your applications or scripts.
API.endpointsDesc: All endpoints return plain text format, one key per line.
API.fullDesc: Returns the complete list of verified keys (up to 100). Ideal for bulk import.
API.liteDesc: Returns a random selection of 15 keys. Best for quick access or lightweight clients.
